pr.title: Non-record: Looped Transformer + LoRA + Skip Connections + NorMuon + SWA + Int6 + Sliding Window

output.summary: Looped 5-block transformer uses per-virtual-layer LoRA and encoder-decoder skips for 30 virtual layers, trained with NorMuon/SWA plus Int6 quant and sliding-window eval.
techniques: Looped recurrence with per-layer LoRA and skip connections
NorMuon optimizer with wallclock-aware warmdown and SWA
Int6 quantization plus fp16 embeddings with sliding-window evaluation
